ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Full name of the gene */,
  "gene_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome location of the gene */,
  "function" TEXT /* Brief description of gene function */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Gene sequence */,
  "organism_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organism */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genes_organism_id FOREIGN KEY ("organism_id") REFERENCES organisms ("organism_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proteins" (
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein */,
  "protein_name" TEXT /* Full name of the protein */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gene encoding the protein */,
  "function" TEXT /* Brief description of protein function */,
  "structure" TEXT /* Protein structure */,
  "isoforms" TEXT /* List of known isoforms */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Full name of the disease */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the disease */,
  "disease_type" TEXT /* Type of disease */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phenotypes" (
  "phenotype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phenotype */,
  "phenotype_name" TEXT /* Name of the phenotype */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the phenotype */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phenotype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pathways" (
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pathway */,
  "pathway_name" TEXT /* Name of the biological pathway */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pathway */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organisms" (
  "organism_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organism */,
  "organism_name" TEXT /* Name of the organism */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the organism */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organism_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the interaction */,
  "gene1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first gene in the interaction */,
  "gene2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second gene in the interaction */,
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Relation ID that describes the type of interaction */,
  "directional" INTEGER /* Indicates if the interaction is directional */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence score for the interaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_interactions_gene2_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene2_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_interactions_relation_id FOREIGN KEY ("relation_id") REFERENCES relations ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_interactions_gene1_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene1_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the protein interaction */,
  "protein1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first protein in the interaction */,
  "protein2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second protein in the interaction */,
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Relation ID that describes the type of interaction */,
  "directional" INTEGER /* Indicates if the interaction is directional */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence score for the interaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_interactions_protein1_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein1_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_interactions_relation_id FOREIGN KEY ("relation_id") REFERENCES relations ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_interactions_protein2_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein2_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disease_gene_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the link */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene associated with the disease */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_gene_links_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_gene_links_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disease_phenotype_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the link */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease */,
  "phenotype_id" INTEGER /* ID of the phenotype associated with the disease */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_phenotype_links_phenotype_id FOREIGN KEY ("phenotype_id") REFERENCES phenotypes ("phenotype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_phenotype_links_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_pathway_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the link */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pathway associated with the gene */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_pathway_links_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_pathway_links_pathway_id FOREIGN KEY ("pathway_id") REFERENCES pathways ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relations" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the relation */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of relation (e.g., gene-gene, gene-disease) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the score entry */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction this score relates to */,
  "score" REAL /* Score indicating the strength or reliability of the interaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES protein_interactions ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES gene_interactions ("interaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_publications" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the link */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication associated with the interaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_publications_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES protein_interactions ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_publications_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_publications_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES gene_interactions ("interaction_id")
)
